name: ScrapeGraph MCP Server (Official)
what_it_does: Official ScrapeGraph MCP server from ScrapeGraphAI enabling AI agents to perform AI-powered web scraping — extracting structured data from web pages using LLMs, searching and scraping content intelligently, handling JavaScript-rendered pages, and integrating ScrapeGraph's AI-driven web extraction into agent-driven data collection and web research workflows.
use_cases: Extracting structured data from web pages using AI from data collection agents
Scraping JavaScript-rendered content with intelligent extraction from research agents
Searching and extracting product information from e-commerce monitoring agents
Collecting news and article content from media monitoring agents
Extracting data from complex web forms and tables from data pipeline agents
Building web-based datasets for analysis from data science agents
not_for: Teams using Puppeteer or Playwright for basic browser automation (different purpose)
Sites that explicitly prohibit scraping (always respect robots.txt and ToS)
High-volume scraping requiring separate proxy infrastructure
best_when: An agent needs to extract structured data from web pages intelligently — especially dynamic/complex pages where traditional scrapers fail and LLM-guided extraction helps.
avoid_when: You need simple static HTML parsing (use BeautifulSoup), or if you're scraping sites that prohibit it — ScrapeGraph adds AI overhead for basic scraping tasks.

auth.notes: ScrapeGraph API key from ScrapeGraph dashboard. Single API key for all scraping operations. LLM API key (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.) may also be required depending on deployment mode.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier with limited credits; self-hosted open source version available
pricing.paid_tiers: Cloud API: pay-per-use based on credits
pricing.notes: ScrapeGraph has open source (self-hosted) and cloud API options. Cloud API uses credit-based pricing. LLM costs add up for AI-powered extraction. Official MCP from ScrapeGraphAI.

known_agent_gotchas: LLM-powered extraction has non-deterministic output — same URL may return different structure
Latency is high (2-10s) due to LLM processing — not suitable for real-time applications
Credit consumption varies by page complexity — hard to predict cost per extraction
Sites with bot detection will block scraping regardless of AI approach
robots.txt and ToS must be respected — AI scraping doesn't exempt from legal requirements
Official ScrapeGraphAI MCP — newer project, API may evolve
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key auth. GDPR. Official ScrapeGraphAI MCP. Protect API key. Agents must respect web scraping ToS. Do not scrape private/authenticated content without authorization.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key auth. GDPR. Official ScrapeGraphAI MCP. Protect API key. Respect web scraping ToS and robots.txt.
